name: MFEC Public Company Limited
summary: MFEC Public Company Limited operates as an information technology (IT) services company in Thailand. The company operates through Systems Integration, Maintenance Service, and IT Professional Service segments. It provides securities trading, mobile financial, gamifcation, managed service, information service on mobile/tablet applications, advertisement/PR/marketing, service for platform management system, and ticketing system for all play types. The company also offers mobile products, software as a service, e-commerce, digital content, payment gateway, financial technology, consulting service and computer system development, IT project management and equipment management, outsourcing IT, audit, warranty management, maintenance, and system integration for cloud and office work. In addition, it provides business analytics, agent management, agent leader, smart quotation, eApplication, iClaim, legal tracking system, iCollection, appraisal collateral, and big data services. MFEC Public Company Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
